meta.name: nodejs-javascript-vitest
meta.title: Nodejs Javascript Vitest Skill
meta.description: Guidelines for writing Node.js and JavaScript code with Vitest testing Triggers on: **/*.js, **/*.mjs, **/*.cjs

original_definition.skill_description: Guidelines for writing Node.js and JavaScript code with Vitest testing Triggers on: **/*.js, **/*.mjs, **/*.cjs

actions.name: Write tests for all new features and bug fixes
actions.description: Write tests for all new features and bug fixes

actions.name: When adding new features or making significant changes, upda
actions.description: When adding new features or making significant changes, update the README.md file where necessary

rules.description: Ensure tests cover edge cases and error handling
NEVER change the original code to make it easier to test, instead, write tests that cover the original code as it is
Ask questions if you are unsure about the implementation details, design choices, or need clarification on the requirements
Always answer in the same language as the question, but use english for the generated content like code, comments or docs

directives.description: Use JavaScript with ES2022 features and Node.js (20+) ESM modules
Use Node.js built-in modules and avoid external dependencies where possible
Ask the user if you require any additional dependencies before adding them
Always use async/await for asynchronous code, and use 'node:util' promisify function to avoid callbacks
Keep the code simple and maintainable
Use descriptive variable and function names
Do not add comments unless absolutely necessary, the code should be self-explanatory
Never use `null`, always use `undefined` for optional values
